title: Gyan Bharatam Mission: Maharashtra launches massive hunt for ancient manuscripts
description: Cultural Affairs Minister Ashish Shelar said the Gyan Bharatam Project has been conceptualised with the vision to consolidate this repository of knowledge and make it accessible on a unified platform.

title: Ancient UK market town full of independent shops is gateway to spectacular drive
description: It's the perfect place if you like a combination of adventures and chilling out, taking in the gorgeous scenery.

title: 3,000 people expected at Derry Ancient Order of Hibernians annual St. Patrick’s Day celebrations in Dungiven
description: Up to 3,000 people are expected to take part in the Ancient Order of Hibernians annual St. Patrick’s Day parade in Dungiven this afternoon.

title: How to watch 'The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour' — stream documentary online from anywhere
description: Two-part doc brings events from 100 years ago to life. Here's how to watch "The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour" from anywhere.
